title: Thelypteris fugongensis
taxonomy: Thelypteris fugongensis is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Thelypteris, which is a group of ferns characterized by their simple or compound leaves with pinnate or bipinnate venation. The family Thelypteridaceae is part of the order Polypodiales, which is a large group of ferns with diverse leaf morphology and growth habits. Thelypteris fugongensis is likely native to China, given its specific epithet 'fugongensis', which suggests a connection to the Fugong County in Yunnan Province.
